EXERCISE / MODULE 1 / LESSON 6: THE BUYER’S MINDSET
WHAT IS THE BUYER’ S MINDSET ?
There are four aspects to the buyer’s mindset: What your prospect believes
about (1) the situation, (2) the product, (3) themselves and (4) you.
This exercise is about consciously moving your prospects into the right
mindset. When you’ve done this, it makes the sale that much easier.
As you begin to design your webinar, look at each segment through the lens
of your avatar/prospect and ask yourself if you’ve done all you can to move
prospects into the mindset they need to buy.
Complete the steps below as you do this.
Your goal is to come up with a minimum of 3 answers for each step. If you
can’t, then go back through your presentation/script to strengthen it.

EXERCISE / MODULE 1 / LESSON 6: THE BUYER’S MINDSET
STEP 1. WHAT THEY HAVE TO BELIEVE
ABOUT 	THE SITUATION
List at least 3 things you will do or say in your webinar that will move
prospects from State A to State B.
HOW WILL YOU MOVE PROSPECTS FROM STATE A TO STATE B?
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
STATE A
What Non-Buyers Believe about the
Situation
STATE B
What Buyers Believe about the
Situation
• That it can’t be resolved
• That this is “just the way it is”
• That it’s going to be too hard/
impossible to resolve
• That the situation will probably
improve on it’s own over time
• That it’s not urgent
• That the problem is real
• That an alternative exists
• That it’s hurting their sales / business
• That it’s hard to find a good solution
• That it may not improve (or may get
worse) unless they find out a solution
• That their business/lifestyle/reputation
(etc) is at stake
• That they need a solution as soon as
possible

EXERCISE / MODULE 1 / LESSON 6: THE BUYER’S MINDSET
STEP 2 . WHAT THEY HAVE TO BELIEVE
ABOUT 	THE PRODUCT
List at least 3 things you will do or say in your webinar that will move
prospects from State A to State B.
HOW WILL YOU MOVE PROSPECTS FROM STATE A TO STATE B?
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
STATE A
What Non-Buyers Believe about the
Product
STATE B
What Buyers Believe about the
Product
• That it isn’t worth the investment
• That it’s old/out-of-date
• That it doesn’t apply to them
• That they can find the information
elsewhere
• That it won’t give them the desired
transformation
• That your product is the best/only way
to solve it
• That it will work
• That it’s manageable / doable
• That it will give them new insight into
the situation
• That it’s not dated
• That it’s the best path to solving their
problem
• That it’s worth the investment
• That others have achieved the desired
result

EXERCISE / MODULE 1 / LESSON 6: THE BUYER’S MINDSET
STEP 3. WHAT THEY HAVE TO BELIEVE
ABOUT 	THEMSELVES
List at least 3 things you will do or say in your webinar that will move
prospects from State A to State B.
HOW WILL YOU MOVE PROSPECTS FROM STATE A TO STATE B?
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
STATE A
What Non-Buyers Believe about
Themelves
STATE B
What Buyers Believe about
Themselves
• That they’re too busy
• That they don’t have enough money
• That they are different / the
transformation won’t work for them
• That they can do it alone
• That
• That the promised transformation
applies to them (the “it won’t work for
me” obstacle)
• That they really need it
• That they have the time to do it (learn
and implement product)
• That they have what it takes
(mentally/emotionally etc) to make
the transformation
• That they need outside help / that
they can’t do it alone
• That they are at risk of further
suffering if they don’t get help

EXERCISE / MODULE 1 / LESSON 6: THE BUYER’S MINDSET
STEP 4 . WHAT THEY HAVE TO BELIEVE
ABOUT 	YOU
List at least 3 things you will do or say in your webinar that will move
prospects from State A to State B.
HOW WILL YOU MOVE PROSPECTS FROM STATE A TO STATE B?
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
______________________________________________________________________________
STATE A
What Non-Buyers Believe about You
STATE B
What Buyers Believe about You
• That you can’t be trusted
• That you haven’t proven you can
provide results
• That you aren’t the expert
• That you’re just after their money
• That you are the “real deal”
• That you have a proven method/
system/process
• That you are trustworthy
• That you are the expert
• That you are capable and reliable
• That you have a true desire to serve
them and see them succeed
